quality_policy.manual_screen: selected sources visually screened for rotation over about 15 degrees, mosaic/cutout, severe blur, grayscale, and genuinely unlabelable court truncation
quality_policy.wide_angle_policy: wide and elevated views retained when the court remained recognizable

results_schema.compatibility: Same top-level keys, per-item keys, and canonical label order as the tasks-88-91 sequential export ingest.
